title: Tick 8: wrangler deploy outcomes-mcp to Workers and verify healthz returns 200 from the live URL
question: Does wrangler deploy land outcomes-mcp at a live workers dev URL whose healthz endpoint returns HTTP 200 with body ok and whose root returns the Open Outcome MCP server banner?
success_criteria: wrangler deploy uploads outcomes-mcp to Cloudflare Workers and prints a stable worker URL and a version id
curl against the deployed healthz endpoint returns HTTP 200 with body ok in under one second
runroc outcomes runrocs C2-deploy txt captures the wrangler output the version id the timed healthz probe and the root banner probe

capabilities: outcomes-mcp deployed live at https outcomes-mcp alex-e62 workers dev
healthz endpoint returns HTTP 200 with body ok in 332ms
root endpoint returns the Open Outcome MCP server banner with HTTP 200
